## What & why
<!-- One-paragraph summary. Link the slice: docs/features/<NN-slice>/ -->

## Slice docs
- [ ] `BA.md` / `DEV.md` / `QA.md` / `TEST-PLAN.md` written (or N/A for a tiny fix)
- [ ] ADR added/updated if this changes architecture

## Checklist (Definition of Done)
- [ ] SOLID + hexagonal; external libs behind an adapter (Wrapper Rule); backend ⟂ frontend
- [ ] Unit + integration + (if user-facing) e2e tests, green; coverage gate met
- [ ] `npm run ci` and `npm run build && npm run test:e2e` pass locally
- [ ] **Visual review**: light + dark screenshots attached below
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
